message:
fix: UPDATE regression - read from col.data instead of stale memory_columns

Root cause: getIntValueOptimized, getFloatValueOptimized, getStringValueOptimized
were reading from table.memory_columns for in-memory rows, but setCellValueInt/Float/String
updates col.data directly. This caused filtered SELECTs after UPDATE to return stale values.

Fix: Modified all three get*ValueOptimized functions to read from col.data directly
for in-memory rows (idx >= table.file_row_count).

Also cleaned up debug logging from parseSql SET clause and test file.
